sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6662" key="a)nakallu/nw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνακαλλύνω</orth>, <sense id="n6662.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sweep up,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0496.tlg001:2D" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phryn.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2D.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
